overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a nighttime exploration of a stormy wooden dock. The player walks past a wooden office building and industrial crane, reaching the pier end where lightning illuminates a distant harbor town across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock marketplace with office building and food cart

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dock area past a food cart toward the office building

entered.detail: wooden clapboard building with scalloped awning and RDR signage
ornate black cast iron lamp post with warm yellow glow
small wooden vendor cart with roof structure
large industrial steel crane structure for cargo loading

segments.scene_description: Walking through a stormy wooden dock area at night, passing by a food cart and illuminated street lamps. The wooden office building stands ahead while an industrial crane is visible in the distance, with rain falling on the wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock area with large cargo crane

events.description: moving past the office building into the industrial crane area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large metal crane structure at the dock's edge

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the industrial section of the dock, the large metal gantry crane dominates the view. The office building recedes to the left background as the camera approaches the crane structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock office building exterior with warning signage

events.description: approaching the office building closely to examine the warning sign

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the office building and approaching it closely to read the warning signage

entered.detail: wooden sign reading WARNING NO SMOKING on the office wall

segments.scene_description: Turning back toward the office building, the camera approaches closely enough to read the 'WARNING NO SMOKING' sign on the wooden wall. The building's architectural details become visible before passing by it toward the pier's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of pier overlooking stormy harbor with distant town

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the sky and water surface
panning to reveal the distant harbor town across the stormy water

agents.ego_description: reaching the pier end and looking out at the stormy water and distant illuminated town

entered.detail: weathered wooden railings at the edge of the pier
dark choppy water surface with rain drops hitting it
cluster of buildings with warm lights and god rays piercing through storm clouds

segments.scene_description: Walking to the end of the wooden pier, a dramatic lightning strike illuminates the stormy harbor. The camera pans to reveal a distant harbor town with warm lights glowing through the rain and mist, with god rays piercing the dark storm clouds above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy industrial dock at night that culminates in a dramatic vista of a distant harbor town. It begins by navigating the rain-slicked wooden planks past a food cart and glowing street lamps, with an industrial crane looming in the distance. As the camera moves deeper into the industrial zone, the massive metal gantry crane dominates the view before the perspective shifts back toward the wooden office building to reveal a warning sign on its wall. The scene then pushes past the building toward the edge of the pier, where a sudden lightning strike pierces the dark storm clouds. Finally, the camera pans across the churning water to reveal a distant town with warm lights glowing through the mist and god rays breaking through the rain.
